subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, inasmuch as thou hast adorned thy heart with the ornament of divine knowledge in the days of thy Lord, the All-Merciful. By God! This is the day that hath dawned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لک بما زینت قلبک بطراز العرفان فی ایام ربک الرحمن تالله هذا یوم اصبح
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @prophecy and fulfillment, @firmness in the Covenant, @suffering and imprisonment
